name: OncoVTEGuardClient
title: OncoVTE Guard — SMART-on-FHIR Client Capability Statement
publisher: OncoVTE Guard (AMIA/HL7 FHIR App Competition — Student)
description: Declares the FHIR R4 resources and search interactions OncoVTE Guard requires from an EHR to compute cancer-associated VTE prophylaxis recommendations. This is a CLIENT capability statement: it describes what the app reads, not a server it offers.

rest.documentation: Read-only ambulatory launch. The app reads the in-context Patient plus that patient's active cancer conditions, recent labs and vitals, and active medications.

security.description: EHR launch with OAuth2. Required scopes: launch, patient/Patient.read, patient/Condition.read, patient/Observation.read, patient/MedicationRequest.read, openid, fhirUser.

resource.documentation: In-context patient: demographics, birthDate, sex, US Core race/ethnicity.
Active malignancy diagnoses by ICD-10-CM for Khorana cancer-site scoring and exclusions.
Laboratory (platelets, hemoglobin, WBC, serum creatinine, ALT, AST, total bilirubin) and vital-signs (body weight, body height) by LOINC.
Active medications by RxNorm for DOAC–chemotherapy interaction, ESA, antiplatelet, IMiD, and nephrotoxic-agent detection.
